turns.text: The ETL pipeline really can only handle about 50K transactions per day reliably. The wiki says 100K but that is the theoretical maximum — in practice it starts failing around 80K and we have had incidents at 95K.

claims.evidence_text: The ETL pipeline really can only handle about 50K transactions per day reliably

turns.text: I personally negotiated a verbal agreement with CloudBase for 2-hour response on P1 incidents. The contract says 4 hours but they always respond faster because I built a good relationship with their support lead.

turns.text: Never escalate production incidents on Friday afternoons. This is an informal agreement we made after the February 2024 incident where a Friday escalation cascaded into a weekend-long firefight. Just handle it quietly or wait until Monday unless it is truly catastrophic.

claims.evidence_text: Never escalate production incidents on Friday afternoons, informal agreement after February 2024 incident
